Package index

All functions

advanced-features
Advanced Table Features for zzobj2fig
babel()
Create a babel package specification for language support
batch
Batch Processing API
broom-methods
Broom-Based S3 Methods for Extended Object Support
caching
Caching Layer for o2f
check_latex_deps()
Check LaTeX dependencies for zzobj2fig
check_typst_deps()
Check Typst dependencies for zzo2f
compile_latex()
Compile a LaTeX file to PDF
convert_pdf_to_png()
Convert PDF to PNG
convert_pdf_to_svg()
Convert PDF to SVG
create_latex_template()
Create LaTeX document template with specified packages
crop_pdf()
Crop a PDF file
ensure_pdfcrop()
Ensure pdfcrop is available
ensure_pdflatex()
Ensure pdflatex is available
fontspec()
Create fontspec package specification for custom fonts
formatting
Cell-Level Formatting Utilities
geometry()
Create a geometry package specification
knitr-engine
knitr Engine Integration
latex-include
LaTeX Figure Inclusion Helpers
o2f(<Arima>)
o2f method for ARIMA models
o2f()
Convert objects to LaTeX tables
o2f(<anova>) o2f(<aov>)
o2f method for ANOVA objects
o2f(<coxph>)
o2f method for Cox proportional hazards models
o2f(<cph>)
o2f method for rms Cox proportional hazards models
o2f(<default>) o2f(<data.frame>)
Default method for o2f (data frames)
o2f(<glm>)
o2f method for generalized linear models
o2f(<glmerMod>)
o2f method for lme4 generalized linear mixed models
o2f(<htest>)
o2f method for hypothesis tests
o2f(<kmeans>)
o2f method for k-means clustering
o2f(<lm>)
o2f method for linear models
o2f(<lme>)
o2f method for nlme linear mixed models
o2f(<lmerMod>)
o2f method for lme4 linear mixed models
o2f(<lrm>)
o2f method for rms logistic regression models
o2f(<matrix>)
o2f method for matrix
o2f(<multinom>)
o2f method for multinomial logistic regression
o2f(<nls>)
o2f method for nonlinear least squares models
o2f(<ols>)
o2f method for rms ordinary least squares models
o2f(<orm>)
o2f method for rms ordinal regression models
o2f(<polr>)
o2f method for ordinal logistic regression (polr)
o2f(<prcomp>)
o2f method for principal component analysis
o2f(<psm>)
o2f method for rms parametric survival models
o2f(<survdiff>)
o2f method for survdiff (survival difference tests)
o2f(<survfit>)
o2f method for survfit (survival curves)
o2f(<survreg>)
o2f method for survreg (parametric survival models)
o2f(<table>)
o2f method for table
o2f_batch()
Process multiple tables in batch
o2f_batch_advanced()
Advanced batch processing with per-table options
o2f_batch_spec()
Create a batch specification
o2f_bold_col()
Bold specific columns
o2f_cache_clear()
Clear the o2f cache
o2f_cache_dir()
Get the cache directory
o2f_cache_info()
Get cache statistics
o2f_cache_set_dir()
Set the cache directory
o2f_coef()
Quick coefficient table from model
o2f_collapse_rows()
Create collapse rows specification
o2f_color_row()
Color specific rows
o2f_decimal()
Create decimal-aligned column specification (convenience wrapper)
o2f_footnote()
Create table footnotes
o2f_format()
Create a formatting specification
o2f_header_above()
Create spanning header specification
o2f_highlight()
Highlight cells based on a condition
o2f_include()
Include a o2f table as a LaTeX figure
o2f_include_inline()
Include a o2f table inline (no float)
o2f_include_margin()
Include a o2f table in the margin
o2f_include_sidebyside()
Include side-by-side o2f tables
o2f_include_wrap()
Include a o2f table in a wraptable environment
o2f_inline()
Inline Table for R Markdown Documents
o2f_italic_col()
Italicize specific columns
o2f_list_themes()
List available themes
o2f_margin_packages()
Get required LaTeX packages for margin methods
o2f_mark()
Create footnote marker for table cells
o2f_output_formats()
List available output formats
o2f_ref()
Generate LaTeX for referencing a table
o2f_regression()
Create side-by-side regression comparison table
o2f_rms_compare()
Create side-by-side comparison table for rms models
o2f_siunitx()
Create siunitx column specification for decimal alignment
o2f_theme()
Create a o2f theme
o2f_theme_apa()
APA theme
o2f_theme_clear()
Clear all custom themes
o2f_theme_get()
Get the current global o2f theme
o2f_theme_lancet()
Lancet theme
o2f_theme_minimal()
Minimal theme
o2f_theme_nature()
Nature theme
o2f_theme_nejm()
NEJM theme
o2f_theme_register()
Register a custom theme
o2f_theme_set()
Set the global o2f theme
o2f_theme_unregister()
Unregister a custom theme
o2f_tidy()
Convert any broom-supported object to a LaTeX table
output-formats
Output Format Handlers
print(<o2f_collapse>)
Print method for o2f_collapse objects
print(<o2f_footnote>)
Print method for o2f_footnote objects
print(<o2f_format>)
Print method for o2f_format objects
print(<o2f_header>)
Print method for o2f_header objects
print(<o2f_siunitx>)
Print method for o2f_siunitx objects
print(<o2f_theme>)
Print method for o2f_theme objects
print(<zzo2f_batch_spec>)
Print method for zzo2f_batch_spec
print(<zzo2f_collapse>)
Print method for zzo2f_collapse
print(<zzo2f_format>)
Print method for zzo2f_format
print(<zzo2f_siunitx>)
Print method for zzo2f_siunitx
register_o2f_engine()
Register the o2f knitr engine
register_zzo2f_engine()
Register the zzo2f knitr engine
rms-methods
RMS Package S3 Methods
s3-methods
S3 Methods for Statistical Objects
sanitize_column_names()
Sanitize column names to be valid in both R and LaTeX
sanitize_table_cells()
Sanitize table cells to be LaTeX-safe
themes
Theme System for zzobj2fig
zzo2f-batch
Batch Processing for the Typst Backend
zzo2f-formatting
Cell-Level Formatting Specifications for zzo2f
zzo2f-include
Typst Figure-Inclusion Helpers
zzo2f-inline
Inline Rendering and knitr Engine for the Typst Backend
zzo2f-preamble
Preamble Emitters for the Typst Backend
zzo2f-refs
References and Notes for zzo2f Tables
zzo2f-siunitx
Numeric Alignment for the Typst Backend
zzo2f-stat
Statistical-Object Helpers for the Typst Backend
zzo2f-structure
Structural Specifications for zzo2f Tables
zzo2f()
Typst Backend for Table-to-Figure Conversion
zzo2f(<anova>) zzo2f(<aov>)
zzo2f method for ANOVA objects
zzo2f(<default>) zzo2f(<data.frame>) zzo2f(<matrix>) zzo2f(<table>)
Default method for zzo2f (data frames)
zzo2f(<glm>)
zzo2f method for generalized linear models
zzo2f(<htest>)
zzo2f method for hypothesis tests
zzo2f(<lm>)
zzo2f method for linear models
zzo2f_batch()
Batch-render tables with the Typst backend
zzo2f_batch_advanced()
Advanced batch rendering with per-table overrides
zzo2f_batch_spec()
Spec constructor for zzo2f advanced batch processing
zzo2f_bold_col()
Bold specific columns (Typst backend)
zzo2f_coef()
Coefficient table rendered inline with the Typst backend
zzo2f_collapse_rows()
Collapse repeated values in columns (Typst backend)
zzo2f_color_row()
Apply background color to rows (Typst backend)
zzo2f_compile()
Compile Typst source to an image file
zzo2f_decimal()
Decimal-place formatting for numeric columns (Typst backend)
zzo2f_font()
Font directive for Typst (parallel to fontspec())
zzo2f_footnote()
Table footnotes (Typst backend)
zzo2f_format()
Create a Typst formatting specification
zzo2f_header_above()
Spanning column headers (Typst backend)
zzo2f_highlight()
Highlight cells by condition (Typst backend)
zzo2f_include()
Include a rendered table as a Typst figure
zzo2f_include_inline()
Include a rendered table inline (no figure wrapper)
zzo2f_include_margin()
Include a rendered table in the page margin (approximation)
zzo2f_include_sidebyside()
Include two rendered tables side by side
zzo2f_include_wrap()
Include a rendered table with text flowing around it (approximation)
zzo2f_inline()
Render a table inline for R Markdown / Quarto (Typst backend)
zzo2f_italic_col()
Italicize specific columns (Typst backend)
zzo2f_margin_packages()
Margin-figure preamble packages (Typst: none required)
zzo2f_mark()
Footnote marker for Typst cell content
zzo2f_page()
Page directive for Typst (parallel to geometry())
zzo2f_ref()
Cross-reference to a labeled table (Typst backend)
zzo2f_regression()
Side-by-side regression comparison table (Typst backend)
zzo2f_rms_compare()
Side-by-side RMS regression comparison (Typst backend)
zzo2f_siunitx()
Build a Typst siunitx-analog specification
zzo2f_textlang()
Language directive for Typst (parallel to babel())
zzo2f_tidy()
Tidy a model object and render with the Typst backend
zzz
Package Initialization

Developed by Ronald G. Thomas.
